title: Supabase
html:
Supabase is the load-bearing backend across Yahir's 2024–2025 product work — the place every Brotein / BroMenu artifact eventually lands. The earliest explicit reference is the late-2024 BroMenu product spec (2024 12 21 todos), where Yahir picks Supabase explicitly for two jobs: "Sign in with Apple" auth and storage for scanned-menu data. By July 2025 the choice has hardened into actual schema — 2025 07 09 screenshot 2025 07 09 at 4 51 29 pm 720cb8bf shows the live Supabase table editor with a menu_items table (id uuid, restaurant_id uuid, name text, description text) holding ~45 seeded rows from Chick-fil-A, McDonald's, Starbucks, and Subway. Restaurant IDs use a tiny enum-like UUID convention (...000001, ...000002, ...000003, ...000025) — a deliberate fixture-friendly pattern.

The build-the-pipe-then-fill-it sequencing is visible in the corpus: schema first on July 9, then a 4 a.m. nutrition-PDF scrape sprint on July 17–18 (Chipotle, Little Caesars, Wingstop, Taco Bell ×3) feeding the same table. The May 2025 todos (2025 05 30 todos) treat Supabase uploads as routine maintenance work alongside the leaderboard and group-share features — by then it's plumbing, not a decision.

Supabase fits Yahir's no runway discipline: free tier, predictable, batteries-included auth, no infra to babysit. It pairs with OpenAI (OCR + scoring) and a SwiftUI / Xcode frontend — the whole stack engineered to ship a real iOS app without paying for the Apple Developer fee or running servers.

Source summaries

  • 2024 12 21 todos — first selection in BroMenu spec
  • 2025 05 30 todos — Supabase uploads as routine work
  • 2025 07 09 screenshot 2025 07 09 at 4 51 29 pm 720cb8bf — menu_items schema reveal
  • 2025 07 17 screenshot 2025 07 17 at 9 13 52 pm bb1a5662 — Chipotle data destined for Supabase
  • 2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 2 41 11 am f76d9c99 — Little Caesars scrape
  • 2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 3 10 37 am fedfeec5 — Wingstop scrape
  • 2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 4 56 13 am e3d1a9e8 — Taco Bell scrape
  • 2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 4 56 23 am 02657aa9 — Taco Bell scrape (cont.)

Connections

  • brotein / bromenu — primary consumers
  • anabolic scoring — the logic Supabase data feeds
  • openai api — paired AI layer
  • swiftui / xcode — paired frontend
  • fast food nutrition dataset — the data shape stored here
  • restaurant menu scraping — the ingest pipeline
  • no runway discipline — why Supabase, not a custom backend
